# Official vs Custom OpenAPI Diff

Machine-generated comparison of Clockify's official OpenAPI surface against this repo's
corrected snapshot. The official source here is the committed offline snapshot
(`spec/official/clockify.official.openapi.yaml`); refresh it with `make official-openapi-fetch` to compare against
the live `https://docs.clockify.me/openapi.json`. operationId is unreliable as a join key (only a minority
match), so operations are joined on HTTP method + path with positional parameters.

## CUSTOM_BETTER — present only in the custom spec

Host/auth overrides:

- custom routes https://auditlog-api.api.clockify.me/v1 (host override present only in custom)
- official scheme MarketplaceKeyAuth (header:x-marketplace-token) has no header-equivalent in custom
